[PUBLISHED DATE]: 2023-08-09
[TITLE]: Dam in Norway partially bursts after days of heavy rain, flooding and evacuations | AP News
[METADATA/INTRO]: Dam in Norway partially bursts after days of heavy rain, flooding and evacuations Dam in Norway partially bursts after days of heavy rain, flooding and evacuations...
[BEST EVIDENCE CHUNK]: Huge volumes of water were pouring over the western parts of the dam, Thomson said. 
 The water ripped apart a two-lane road and fences that ran across the top of the dam. 
 Per Storm-Mathisen, a spokesman for the power station operator, told the Norwegian news agency NTB that the water diversion seemed to be “going well.” 
 At least 1,000 people live in communities close to the river in the area, and authorities said that all were evacuated before the dam began to fail. 
 In other developments Wednesday, a Norwegian woman in her 70s died after falling into a stream the day before. She managed to crawl up onto the bank, but because of the floods, it took rescue teams several hours to bring her to a hospital, police said.

[PUBLISHED DATE]: 2023-08-09
[TITLE]: Dam partly collapses in Norway as Storm Hans continues to cause chaos | Norway | The Guardian
[METADATA/INTRO]: A dam in Norway has partly collapsed as the country battles record high river levels, flooding and landslides after a fatal storm. Norwegian police were considering blowing up the dam when water from the Glåma River, the country’s longest, started...
[BEST EVIDENCE CHUNK]: “We have many landslides all over, we have homes being taken, evacuated a lot of people, all the roads are closed and all the rivers are overflowing.” 
 “It’s a big crisis for us. I’ve never seen anything like it,” he added. 
 Hafslund said a fault at Braskereidfoss resulted in water getting into the power plant, which consists of two large turbines and a dam with floodgates. 
 The company said in a statement: “The water has now passed through the filling dam, which is located next to the power plant. For the time being, it appears that the water diversion through the fill dam is going well.

[PUBLISHED DATE]: 2023-08-11
[TITLE]: Norwegian dam breached after heavy flooding, beating police plan to blow floodgates | New Civil Engineer
[METADATA/INTRO]: A dam in Norway has been breached after days of heavy rainfall caused widespread flooding and landslides in the nation’s south eastern region. Flooding on the Glåma river caused the Braskereidfoss hydroelectric power plant to be put out of operation...
[BEST EVIDENCE CHUNK]: A dam in Norway has been breached after days of heavy rainfall caused widespread flooding and landslides in the nation’s south eastern region. 
 Flooding on the Glåma river caused the Braskereidfoss hydroelectric power plant to be put out of operation after it was submerged and huge volumes of water poured over the western parts of the concrete dam. 
 Norwegian authorities considered using explosives to blow open the jammed flood gates but scrapped the idea after water broke through the structure, local police said. 
 The flooding occurred due to a powerful storm, named Hans, which has been sweeping across northern Europe for several days.
